__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-12: Bacterial SD/RBS: Shine–Dalgarno-like motif (consensus AGGAGG) within 5–13 nt of the AUG; ΔG(−30..+30) > −10 kcal/mol.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
